sections.title: Before the Interview
sections.description: Preparation checklist for 24-48 hours before your interview.
items: Read the job description and identify 5 required skills.
Prepare one STAR story each for leadership, conflict, and failure.
Revise 2-3 core projects and be ready to explain impact metrics.
Practice role-specific fundamentals for at least 45 minutes.
Test camera, microphone, and internet reliability in advance.

sections.title: Technical Round
sections.description: How to structure technical answers under time pressure.
items: Clarify constraints and assumptions before coding or designing.
Explain your approach out loud before implementation.
Discuss complexity and trade-offs even if not asked.
Call out edge cases and how your solution handles them.
Close with test cases and production-readiness checks.

sections.title: Communication and Presence
sections.description: Communication habits that improve interviewer confidence.
items: Answer in short structured blocks: context, action, result.
Use concrete numbers when describing outcomes.
Pause and think briefly instead of rushing into weak answers.
Ask one clarifying question when requirements are ambiguous.
Summarize your final answer in one sentence.

sections.title: After the Interview
sections.description: Post-interview loop to improve next performance.
items: Write down every question asked within 30 minutes.
Score your own responses and identify 2 weak topics.
Send a concise thank-you message within 24 hours.
Convert mistakes into targeted prep-card topics.
Schedule your next mock session immediately.
